Sgt. Declan Coady

tweets.text:
"I just didn't hear about crime, I lived it... I attended funerals that never should've happened," says a Memphis mother to @POTUS.

"For years, we looked to our local leaders hoping that something—anything—would change. But nothing did, and that was until you, my President, stepped in... Today, I can sit out on my porch and drink tea in peace."
